articles.title: Nikola Jokić and Julius Randle Ejected After McDaniels’ Provocative Layup
articles.original_title: Nikola Jokić boils over after McDaniels’s mocking layup in Nuggets’ loss to Timberwolves
articles.summary: In the closing moments of the Timberwolves’ 112-96 win over the Nuggets, Jaden McDaniels made a meaningless layup that appeared to mock the Denver bench. The gesture sparked a confrontation that led to the ejection of Nikola Jokić and Julius Randle. The incident occurred with the game already out of reach for Denver.
key_points: McDaniels’ late layup was seen as a taunt toward the Nuggets.
Both Jokić and Randle were ejected following the exchange.
The Timberwolves secured a decisive 112-96 victory.
